title: Force Bridge - Rekt
relevance_summary: Access control exploit with multi-chain attack on retiring protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers funds across multiple chains within a short timeframe

red_flags: Funding transactions before the sunset announcement
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers funds across multiple chains within a short timeframe
summary: Attackers exploited access control vulnerabilities to drain Force Bridge across Ethereum and BNB Chain. A multi-chain attack was executed shortly after the protocol announced its retirement, resulting in significant losses.
